title: Fighting Climate Change: the Role of Norms, Preferences, and Moral Values
authors: Armin Falk, Peter Andre, Teodora Boneva, and Felix Chopra

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: require fossil fuel companies to pay a carbon tax and use the money to reduce other taxes (such as income tax) by an equal amount
tax_mentions.context: One item in the climate policy support index; support is not analyzed separately from other policies.

excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Carbon tax is only one item within a broader climate policy index; no separate tax-specific analysis is reported.

inclusion_reason: Carbon-tax support is mentioned only as one component of a broader policy-support index, not as a separate tax-specific outcome.
exclusion_reason: No direct carbon/fuel-tax acceptability analysis; the tax item is bundled into a general climate-policy support index.
